name: Foundation Industries
long_description:
For the first time in decades, fast, flexible domestic production can be economically superior. We’re rebuilding America’s productive edge through low-volume, high-mix manufacturing, helping hard-tech teams prototype faster, launch sooner, and build more here.

If you want to restore American productive power and ship real hardware, reach out.

jakob@foundation-industries.com
one_liner: We supply hard tech companies with critical components.
